commands.repair_reason: No repair lane is needed because the open PR has no blocking review finding and should proceed through normal maintainer review and CI.; Cleared: The diff only changes Matrix channel metadata, a focused test assertion, and docs text; it adds no dependency, workflow, secret, install, or code-execution surface. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Matrix `defaultMarkdownTableMode: "bullets"`, asserts that metadata in the Matrix channel adapter test, and updates the markdown-formatting docs.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: Matrix has no plugin table default on current main, so the shared resolver falls back to `code` and Matrix send/edit paths convert tables with that mode.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed because the open PR has no blocking review finding and should proceed through normal maintainer review and CI.
